description: Presence Level starts at 100 and uses a FIFO queue of [+1, -1] points.
steps: Modify ProgressService to store a List<int> of points
Implement FIFO cap (e.g., 50 most recent interactions)
Calculate current Presence as (Initial 100 + Sum(List)) / scale
Write unit tests to verify points are added/removed correctly

description: The tree_gn.glb model renders correctly in the app.
steps: Update ZenTreeRenderer to use the new model path
Verify model loads without shader errors

description: The tree scales continuously and animates when leaves are added.
steps: Map leafCount to a scale factor in ZenTreeData
Use AnimatedScale to transition between sizes
Implement Premium check (Hide days 6-12 for free users)
Style cards with Glassmorphism (blur, thin borders)

description: Tapping a tree reveals a detailed session breakdown.
steps: Create Glassmorphic overlay displaying Solo vs Coop leaves
Display Deep Focus (Avg Reaction Time) on the overlay
